title: Vandae Mataram Gathering
summary: A memorable gathering of students, faculty, and distinguished guests celebrating national spirit and cultural harmony.
description: The Open Theatre of Tripura University witnessed a memorable gathering as students from various departments, respected faculty members, and distinguished guests came together to mark a historic occasion. The event reflected the values of unity, patriotism, and collective responsibility, creating an atmosphere of pride and inspiration. We pay our heartfelt tribute and respect to this memorable moment, which stands as a symbol of national spirit, cultural harmony, and the unwavering bond that unites us all.
highlights: Active participation from faculty and students
Promotion of unity and cultural harmony
